targets.rawSql: SELECT splitByChar('/', file_path)[4] AS top_folder, sum(size) AS bytes FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND top_folder != '' GROUP BY top_folder ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT multiIf(size<1024,'<1K', size<1048576,'1K-1M', size<1073741824,'1M-1G', size<1099511627776,'1G-1T','>1T') AS bucket, count() AS files, sum(size) AS bytes FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id' GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY min(size)

SELECT extension, sumIf(size, modified>now()-INTERVAL 90 DAY) AS active_b, sumIf(size, modified<=now()-INTERVAL 90 DAY AND modified>now()-INTERVAL 365 DAY) AS warm_b, sumIf(size, modified<=now()-INTERVAL 365 DAY AND modified>now()-INTERVAL 3 YEAR) AS cold_b, sumIf(size, modified<=now()-INTERVAL 3 YEAR) AS frozen_b FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id' GROUP BY extension ORDER BY (active_b+warm_b+cold_b+frozen_b) DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT splitByChar('/', file_path)[4] AS top_folder, count() AS files, sum(size) AS bytes FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND last_accessed < now()-INTERVAL 3 YEAR AND top_folder != '' GROUP BY top_folder ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Cold Capacity — Top Folders (by last_accessed, candidates to archive)

targets.rawSql: SELECT filename, size, count() AS copies, (count()-1)*size AS wasted_bytes FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND size > 1048576 GROUP BY filename, size HAVING copies > 1 ORDER BY wasted_bytes DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT toString(least(countSubstrings(acl,';'), 40)) AS ace_count, count() AS files FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id' GROUP BY ace_count ORDER BY toUInt32(ace_count)

panels.title: ACL Complexity — Semicolons per ACL (proxy for ACE count)

panels.description: Percent of files per department not accessed within the last 1y / 3y / 5y. Based on last_accessed. Color gradient: green (low dormancy) → orange → red (high dormancy). Dept tail with <1000 files excluded.

targets.rawSql: SELECT splitByChar('/', file_path)[4] AS dept, round(100.0 * countIf(last_accessed < now() - INTERVAL 1 YEAR) / count(), 1) AS pct_aging_1y, round(100.0 * countIf(last_accessed < now() - INTERVAL 3 YEAR) / count(), 1) AS pct_dormant_3y, round(100.0 * countIf(last_accessed < now() - INTERVAL 5 YEAR) / count(), 1) AS pct_ancient_5y, count() AS files FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND dept != '' GROUP BY dept HAVING files > 1000 ORDER BY pct_dormant_3y DESC LIMIT 16

panels.title: Dormancy by Department (by last_accessed)

list.name: run_id
list.query: SELECT run_id FROM symphony.scan_results GROUP BY run_id ORDER BY max(run_start_time) DESC
